subject: Passimian, a primate Pokemon with grey-white coloring and a leafy helmet marking, perched near a tree in a forest
description: A primate Pokemon with grey-white fur, dark limbs, and a distinctive leaf-patterned marking on its head clings to or stands against a large tree trunk. The figure has a round light-colored belly and dark facial features, oriented forward with a sturdy grounded posture. The background shows warm browns and earthy greens of a forest environment, with the tree providing a natural backdrop.
foreground: grey-white primate Pokemon with dark limbs and leaf-pattern head marking near a tree trunk
background: forest with warm earthy browns and greens
